fields.accident_description: On or about 11/16/2016, while the plaintiff, CHARKIMA S. EDWARDS, was on the premises located at 1022 Rockaway Avenue, Brooklyn, New York, plaintiff fell and was caused to be injured due to a defective, unsafe and dangerous condition.
fields.defendant_name: ROCKAWAY AVENUE LLC, and MOBIL CORPORATION
fields.list_of_exhibits: EXHIBIT A (Summons and Complaint), EXHIBIT B (Answer)
fields.plaintiffs_law_firm_address: 150 Broadway - 23rd Fl, New York, New York 10038
fields.relevant_case_citation: Lasek v. Nachtigall, 189 A.D.2d 749 (2d Dept. 1993); Hudson v. MBSTOA, 188 A.D.2d 355 (1st Dept. 1992); Corning v. Carlin, 178 A.D.2d 576 (2d Dept. 1991); Simpson v. Bellew, 161 A.D.2d 693 (2d Dept. 1990)
fields.accident_location_description: Mobil Gas Station located at 1022 Rockaway Avenue
fields.court_name: Supreme Court of the State of New York

facts: Plaintiff Charkima S. Edwards sustained personal injuries after falling on November 16, 2016, at the premises located at 1022 Rockaway Avenue, Brooklyn, New York.

Plaintiff alleges that defendants Rockaway Avenue LLC and Mobil Corporation were negligent in owning, operating, and maintaining the premises, allowing it to remain in a defective, unsafe, and dangerous condition.
The legal action was commenced by filing a Summons and Complaint on February 1, 2017.
Defendants Rockaway Avenue LLC and Mobil Corporation filed a Verified Answer on March 9, 2017, raising multiple affirmative defenses including comparative negligence and collateral source offsets.
Charkima S. Edwards sustained an injury in an accident on November 16, 2016.
Charkima S. Edwards was born on April 9, 1991, and resides in Brooklyn, New York.
Medical records and bills were requested from Brookdale University Hospital and Medical Center for dates of service from November 16, 2016, to the present.
Charkima S. Edwards is represented by Subin Associates, LLP in a personal injury litigation.
Tampa Development Corp. sold the property located at 1408 Linden Boulevard (also known as 1022 Rockaway Avenue), Brooklyn, NY to Rockaway Avenue LLC.
The property transfer and deed execution took place on August 27, 2003.
The property is legally identified as being in the Borough of Brooklyn, Block 3643, Lot 28.
The full sale price for the property transfer was listed as $1,069,649.00.
The Date of Loss (DOL) is November 16, 2016.
The claimant is Charkima S Edwards (also listed as Clarkima S Edwards).
The insured party is Bolla Management Corp under policy number PHPK1532158.
The claim number associated with the matter is 1038207.
The Date of Loss (DOL) is 11/16/2016.
The claimant for claim number 1038207 is Charikma S Edwards.
The insured party is Bola Management Corp.
The plaintiff is Charmika Edwards.
The date of loss is November 16, 2016.
The location of loss is 1408 Linden Blvd., Brooklyn, NY.
The policyholder is Renaissance Realty Group, LLC.
The insurance claim file number is 2439869-1 under Associated Industries Insurance Company.
The plaintiff is represented by Herbert S. Subin, Esq. of Subin Associates, LLP.
The document details Facebook privacy and account settings for Terrell McCasland.
Terrell McCasland's primary email address associated with the Facebook account is terrell_mac@hotmail.com.

An arbitration expense of $425.00 was paid to The Jansen Group, Inc. on January 24, 2017, for the case DeJesus v. Maddox-Clark.

During January 2017, numerous expenses were recorded for obtaining medical and hospital records from providers including Hackensack University Medical, New York-Presbyterian/Queens, and Bentwood Chiropractic Associates.
Multiple index numbers and motions were filed or requested between January 25 and January 31, 2017, for various cases including Benjamin v. Regis, Brown v. Parkchester, and Algarin v. 1612 Madison.

The client retains Subin Associates, LLP to prosecute a negligence claim for personal injuries.
The attorney's contingency fee is set at 33 1/3% of the gross recovery.
A $350 fee is applicable for processing statutory No-Fault benefits if the claim involves a motor vehicle accident.
Plaintiff Charkima S. Edwards tripped and fell on a drainage system at a Mobil Gas Station on November 16, 2016.
The incident occurred at 1022 Rockaway Avenue, Brooklyn, New York 11236.
Plaintiff sustained injuries to the left foot, left hand, left side of body, back, and left knee.
Following the incident, the plaintiff was transported by ambulance to Brookdale University Hospital and Medical Center.
The plaintiff has a history of a prior motor vehicle accident 5-10 years ago, which caused right side body pain and involved an MRI of the neck and back.
The defendant/premises owner is identified as Bolla Em Realty Rockaway Avenue LLC.
Plaintiff Charkima S. Edwards fell and sustained severe personal injuries on November 16, 2016.

Defendants Rockaway Avenue LLC and Mobil Corporation are alleged to have owned, operated, maintained, and controlled the premises where the incident occurred.
The personal injury action was commenced by the filing of a Summons and Complaint on February 1, 2017 in Kings County Supreme Court (Index No. 502091/2017).
Plaintiff's counsel, Subin Associates, LLP, filed an Order to Show Cause to be relieved as the attorney for the plaintiff due to irreconcilable differences.

Plaintiff suffered physical pain and bodily injuries, requiring medical aid, attention, and medicines.
Plaintiff has been unable to attend to his usual occupation as a result of the injuries sustained.
